{{Quote|There is always time to crush incompetence and cowardice. Fire!|Liak ke Mattino|<ref name="SOA" />}}
'''Liak ke Mattino''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Strike the Moons Flightknife]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. He and his [[flightknife]] were the first Adumari pilots to fly against [[Red Flight]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] diplomatic group sent to Adumar, in a non-live-fire battle. He later helped them escape the [[Gauntlet of Red Flight|gauntlet]] by engaging the [[Lords of Dismay Flightknife]]. During the [[Adumari Civil War]], ke Mattino was shot down and [[Death/Legends|killed]].<ref name="SOA" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Liak ke Mattino is a character created by author [[Aaron Allston]] for the [[1999]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'', the ninth volume in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-Wing'']] series.<ref name="SOA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
